items.statcast_observation: Jac Caglianone produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 113.5 mph at a 33.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals lost to the San Diego Padres, KC 2, SD 19. Jac Caglianone led the night, 2-4 | HR, 2B, RBI in the latest Royals game. Jac Caglianone supplied the loudest Royals contact at 113.5 mph.
items.title: Royals vs Padres Recap
